title: 2025 to 2026 Postgraduate Master's change of circumstances form
body: "Change an application  Use your online account to change your personal details, for example bank or contact details. Contact Student Finance England directly if you do not have an account.  Other changes  Use the change of circumstances form if you need to change any other details, for example your university or course. You cannot do this online.  You can find the change of circumstances form for other available academic years here:   2024 to 2025 academic year form  "
